overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a foggy night walk through a dystopian urban environment. The player character moves from an open street lined with palm trees and neon-lit buildings into a covered parking garage, with dense atmospheric haze and artificial street lighting creating a moody cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with elevated highway

events.description: traffic light changes to red as camera approaches the intersection
two pedestrians begin crossing the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy street toward the intersection, observing the traffic signal

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians in jackets crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: illuminated green street sign mounted on the building wall
tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
tall glass building with illuminated windows visible through the fog
traffic signal pole showing red light
elevated highway structure with metal security fencing on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy Night City street with the 'San Amaro' sign visible on a building to the right. The camera walks forward along the asphalt road toward an intersection, passing palm trees on the left and an elevated highway structure on the right. As the traffic light turns red, two pedestrians cross the street ahead, moving from left to right across the frame.

events.description: passing the pedestrians who are now walking alongside on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the concrete sidewalk next to the elevated highway fence, moving toward the parking garage entrance

entered.detail: dark opening to a covered parking structure becoming visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera moves along a concrete sidewalk with the elevated highway fence now closer on the right. The street sign and traffic light fall behind as the focus shifts toward a parking garage entrance visible in the distance ahead. Sparse traffic continues to move on the street to the left, and the fog persists throughout the urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking garage with security barriers

events.description: entering the covered parking garage from the open sidewalk
turning right to navigate around concrete barriers and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: entering the parking garage and maneuvering through the interior space around barriers

notable_agents.action: dark utility van parked near the entrance inside the garage

entered.detail: movable metal slat security barriers lining the left side of the entrance
dark colored utility van parked inside the garage entrance
large concrete support pillars for the overhead highway structure
bright linear LED light fixtures illuminating the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the foggy street into a covered parking garage, passing through the entrance where metal slat barriers line the left wall. Inside, a dark van is parked near the entrance, and overhead LED lights illuminate the concrete interior. The camera turns right to navigate deeper into the parking structure, moving past concrete pillars and leaving the open street behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a foggy, neon-lit urban street into the enclosed concrete depths of a parking garage. It begins by walking along an asphalt road in Night City, passing palm trees and a building marked with a San Amaro sign as pedestrians cross an intersection ahead. As the camera moves past the traffic light and follows a concrete sidewalk, the elevated highway fence closes in on the right while the focus shifts toward a distant garage entrance. The scene then transitions from the hazy open air into the covered structure, passing metal slat barriers and a parked dark van under the glow of overhead LED lights. Finally, the camera turns right to navigate deeper into the parking garage, moving past heavy concrete pillars as the street is left behind.
